title: HEALTH AND FITNESS - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF ALBANY HEALTH AND FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Focuses on improving the overall health of Club Members by increasing their daily physical activity through recreational activities and team sports, providing nutrition education, and helping them develop healthy relationships. 1215 Hill Street SE Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-6pm, sports seasons vary Email (541) 926-6666 211 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 926-6666 ext 211 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for information FEES: Club membership: $25 per year. Scholarships available. Sports programs may have additional fees. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Greater Albany Public School District (Cities of Albany and Tangent) TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located between Queen Avenue and Pacific Highway. From Highway 99E (Pacific Boulevard), take a right at the Human Bean coffee shop. In the large building on the left after the United Way of Linn County. Bus stop on the corner. From I-5 South, Exit 234-A: Follow signs to Corvallis and turn left on Hill Street. From I-5 North, Exit 233: Turn left onto Highway 20, follow signs to Corvallis, then turn left on Hill Street. Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Team Sports/Leagues Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
